Subsection.title: Version 2.0
Subsection.Paragraph: Version 2.0 of the specification corrected a mistake in the 1.0 specification with regard to the way that section sizes were specified. In version 1.0 of the specification, section sizes were specified as follows:

FormalItem.title: Section Padding

Subsection.Paragraph: However, the actual intention was to specify them as:

FormalItem.title: Section No Padding

Subsection.Paragraph: In other words: Section sizes used to include the padding octets that are used to align the next section to a 16 octet boundary. Unfortunately, this then meant that there was ambiguity with regard to the number of padding octets that were used. In version 2.0 of the specification, the section size no longer includes the padding octets. This is a backwards-incompatible change in a number of places, because 1.0 parsers could fail when encountering corrected section size values.
Worse, the reference implementation of the calino specification actually already implemented the 2.0 behaviour. Therefore, the decision was made to release a new format version and deprecate 1.0.
